visual_description: The man in a white shirt stands at a desk, holding a tissue and bringing it to his mouth while another man in a white shirt sits nearby holding a cup and a bag of food. The standing man places the tissue in his mouth and chews, while the seated man watches him and then drinks from his cup. The background shows a glass-walled office environment with equipment on the desk.
